subcodes.first_line: O thou who art eager for the Beloved of all horizons! His honour Áqá Siyyid Asadu'lláh hath rendered exceeding praise and commendation of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق دلبر آفاق جناب آقا سید اسدالله نعت و ستایش زاید الوصف از شما نمودند
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @martyrs and martyrdom
